user.title: Configure Simple PID Controller
user.description: Enter a name and choose the sensor to drive the PID loop.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance with this name is allowed.

error.already_configured: A configuration with this name already exists.
error.input_range_min_max: Minimum must be lower than maximum.
error.output_range_min_max: Minimum must be lower than maximum.

init.title: Edit PID Controller Options
init.description: Modify the sensor entity and range used by the controller.

data_description.step_kp: Increment size for the Kp parameter.
data_description.step_ki: Increment size for the Ki parameter.
data_description.step_kd: Increment size for the Kd parameter.
data_description.step_sample_time: Increment size for the sample time parameter.
data_description.step_setpoint: Increment size for the setpoint picker.
data_description.step_output_min: Increment size for the output minimum.
data_description.step_output_max: Increment size for the output maximum.
data_description.step_starting_output: Increment size for the startup value.

error.range_min_max: Minimum must be lower than maximum.

set_output.name: Set PID output
set_output.description: Set or reset the PID controller output.

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: Use a preset output: zero_start, last_known_value or startup_value.

value.name: Value
value.description: Manual output value between output_min and output_max.
